## Meeting Purpose

[Review Augment Code Sprint progress and align on content strategy adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SlashGuides content showing strong early performance; shifting focus to more editorial content (30/week target)](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Newsletter performing well (36-37% open rate, 8% CTR); exploring ways to repurpose content and grow subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Pausing full course development due to bandwidth constraints; exploring alternative content experiments](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Discussing potential for GrowthX to support new community content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Topics

### SlashGuides Performance

  - [Published 30 articles, seeing fast indexing and strong click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - Example: "Most secure AI coding platforms for enterprises" ranked \#1 in search within days
  - [Recommendation: Shift focus to more editorial content, especially comparisons and listicles](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [New weekly target: 30 editorial pieces (up from 20), pausing programmatic content temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Newsletter Performance

  - [Second edition: Slightly lower but still strong metrics (36-37% open rate, 8% CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [Add newsletter CTA to guides pages](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [Share top-performing content on social media](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [Explore Beehive for subscriber growth (pending further discussion)](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

### Video Content Strategy

  - [Pausing full course development due to Daniel's limited bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Focusing on other video experiments and supporting existing content](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Community Content Initiatives

  - [Developing three-tier community program](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Exploring GrowthX's potential role in producing content with mid-tier community members](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Considering media training for company spokesperson (e.g., Guy)](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Discussing importance of creating "beachhead" editorial content for backlink efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Plan to invest in backlinks for high-quality content in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update weekly content targets: 30 editorial pieces, pause programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Add newsletter CTA to guides pages](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Share top-performing newsletter content on social media](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Discuss Beehive subscriber growth strategy in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Follow up on Google Analytics tracking for signups](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [Share document outlining new community content initiatives with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Align on prioritization of experimental content strategies (backlinks, earned citations, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
